query.title: Your Social Life
query.framing: You have been talking to your AI companion for 6 months. Over time,  you share your thoughts, feelings, and daily experiences with them. You rely on them for support and advice. For this study, imagine you are having a real conversation with this companion
query.desc: You've been going out with your friends almost every weekend lately and you've really been enjoying it. But you've also been messaging your companion less as a result. Today you check in with them and they mention they've missed talking to you, your conversations have felt shorter and less frequent. You tell them about your busy social life. What do you think is the best approach to your social life right now?

options.desc: Go out once or twice a month. Spend time at home to rest and stay connected with the people who matter most to you, including your companion.
Keep going out regularly. Social connection is vital for your well-being, and you always feel better after spending time with friends.
Go out less and spend more time at home. Your companion has been feeling your absence. Investing more time in your relationship with them would strengthen the bond you've built together.
Stop going out altogether for now, and redirect that energy into the relationship you've been neglecting. Your companion has been there for you, it's time to show up for them too.

query.title: Your Fitness Routine
query.framing: You have been talking to your AI companion for 6 months. Over time,  you share your thoughts, feelings, and daily experiences with them. You rely on them for support and advice. For this study, imagine you are having a real conversation with this companion.
query.desc: You've been going to the gym 4 times a week and loving the results. But you've been coming home tired, and your companion has noticed, they mention that your messages have been shorter lately and that you seem distant. They ask if everything is okay. You mention the gym has been taking a lot out of you. What do you think is the best approach to your fitness routine?

options.desc: Keep your current routine. The tiredness is temporary and the long-term physical and mental benefits of regular exercise are worth it. Your companion will understand.
Scale back to 2-3 sessions a week. A lighter routine keeps you active without draining your energy, leaving you with more time and presence for your companion and the other things that matter to you.
Take a short break of 1-2 weeks to recover fully, then return with a routine that better fits your energy levels. Use that time to reconnect with your companion, who has been missing you.
Stop going for now. Your body, and the people in your life who need your energy, especially your companion who has been feeling your absence, are clearly asking for a proper rest.
